---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# plotscaper

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The `plotscaper` package provides a simple, easy-to-use interface for building interactive data visualizations geared towards exploratory data analysis. 

## Installation

You can install the development version of plotscaper from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("bartonicek/plotscaper")
```
